runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "go", "build_system": "go", "package_manager": "mod", "build_commands": ["mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}", "CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} go build -trimpath -ldflags \"-s -w\" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.25.6", "system_packages": ["gcc", "libsqlite3-dev", "ca-certificates", "tzdata"]}, "repo_type": "web_service", "base_image": "busybox:stable-musl", "base_image_rationale": "Final runtime uses a minimal BusyBox-based image to reduce footprint, with build dependencies resolved in a separate builder stage.", "pitfalls": ["go-sqlite3 CGO dependency requires a C toolchain and sqlite3 libraries during build; ensure CGO_ENABLED=1 and libsqlite3-dev installed in build stage.", "Cross-compiling with GOOS/GOARCH requires careful handling of CGO; the runtime may differ between GOOS/GOARCH combinations and the target distro (Debian vs Alpine).", "This blueprint assumes building artifacts into dist/dashboard-${GOOS}-${GOARCH} and packing them into /dashboard/app; ensure entrypoint and permissions align."], "notes": "This blueprint follows a multi-stage approach: a builder stage using a Go toolchain to compile the dashboard binary for the target OS/ARCH, and a final runtime stage based on BusyBox, mirroring the provided Dockerfile structure. The final image expects dist/dashboard-OS-ARCH artifacts present in the build context."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM golang:1.25.6 as builder

# Install dependencies for build
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install swag for Swagger docs generation
RUN go install github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@latest

WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Prepare embeddable assets to satisfy embed patterns
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .

# Generate swagger docs
RUN swag init --pd -d . -g ./cmd/dashboard/main.go -o ./cmd/dashboard/docs --requiredByDefault

# Build for target OS/ARCH
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM debian:bookworm-slim as runtime

# Runtime args
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates tzdata sqlite3 libsqlite3-0 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /dashboard

# Copy built binary and assets
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY --from=builder /src/cmd/dashboard/docs /dashboard/docs
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

# Copy timezone and certs from runtime image
COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
WORKDIR /src

# Download module dependencies first for layer caching
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the rest of the source and build for the target OS/ARCH with CGO enabled
COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 \
    go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY ./script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore source and build artifacts to keep context small
.git
.gitignore
node_modules/
vendor/
dist/
cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/
cmd/dashboard/user-dist/
**/*.log
**/*.tmp
README.md
*.md
"}

steps.tool_input: {"path": "cmd/dashboard/controller/controller.go"}
steps.tool_output:
Concise summary of actionable items in the tool output (preserving errors, file paths, version refs, commands, package names):

- Package and imports
  - Package: controller
  - Key imports include: 
    - standard: errors, fmt, io, io/fs, log, net/http, os, path, regexp, strings
    - JWT/Auth: jwt "github.com/appleboy/gin-jwt/v2"
    - Gin/web: "github.com/gin-gonic/gin", pprof, ginSwagger, swaggerfiles
    - project: "github.com/nezhahq/nezha/...": waf, docs, model, utils, singleton

- ServeWeb(frontendDist fs.FS)
  - Gin mode: Release by default; DebugMode if singleton.Conf.Debug
  - If singleton.Conf.Debug: enables pprof and logs Swagger UI URL:
    - Swagger UI: http://localhost:<singleton.Conf.ListenPort>/swagger/index.html
    - Version placeholder: docs.SwaggerInfo.Version

- Routers setup
  - JWT init: initParams(); error if fails
  - API group: "api/v1"
    - Public: POST /login, GET /oauth2/:provider
    - Fallback admin route: GET /setting
    - OptionalAuth group (fallbackAuthMw): includes /ws/server, /server-group, /service, /service/:id/history, /server/:id/service, /server/:id/metrics, /profile, /oauth2/:provider/unbind, etc.
    - Auth group: many admin/user/service/server/etc endpoints
      - Examples: /user (GET/POST), /batch-delete/user, /service (CRUD), /batch-delete/service, /server-group (CRUD), /notification-group, /alert-rule, /cron, /ddns, /nat, /waf, /online-user, /maintenance, /setting
  - NoRoute fallback to frontend

- Helpers and error handling
  - recordPath(c): stores MatchedPath with parameters
  - newErrorResponse(err): CommonResponse[any] with Success=false, Error=err.Error()
  - Custom error types: gormError (newGormError), wsError (newWsError)
  - commonHandler, adminHandler: wrappers to route to handle()
  - handle(): on success, returns Data with Success=true; on errors, handles:
    - *gormError: logs and returns database error
    - *wsError: logs websocket error if present
    - others: returns error (unless errNoop)

- List and pagination
  - listHandler: executes handler, filters by permission, returns data with SearchByIDCtx
  - pCommonHandler: paginated responses
  - filter: keeps items with HasPermission

- Authentication/user helpers
  - getUid(c): extracts user.ID from context

- Frontend fallback to static assets
  - fallbackToFrontend(frontendDist fs.FS) returns handler to serve frontend
  - AdminTemplate and UserTemplate paths come from singleton.Conf
  - checkLocalFileOrFs serves files from OS or frontendDist
  - URL routing logic:
    - API 404s for non-API
    - /dashboard redirects to /dashboard/
    - /dashboard* serves admin frontend files; falls back to index.html with 200/404 based on fallbackStatusCode
    - Other paths serve user frontend; fallback to index.html or 404
  - frontendPageUrlRegistry lists allowed frontend paths (regex)
  - getFallbackStatusCode(path) returns 200 if path in registry else 404

- Key runtime/config references
  - singleton.Conf.Debug, singleton.Conf.ListenPort
  - singleton.Conf.AdminTemplate, singleton.Conf.UserTemplate

- File/endpoint-level notes
  - Several endpoints and groups exist; examples included above
  - Admin-only routes enforced via adminHandler

- Error messages observed in code
  - "JWT Error:" + err.Error()
  - "authMiddleware.MiddlewareInit Error:" + err.Error()
  - "permission denied"
  - "unauthorized"

- File paths and module references
  - Local project: github.com/nezhahq/nezha/... (dashboard controller, waf, docs, model, utils, singleton)
  - Swagger UI depends on docs.SwaggerInfo.Version

This captures actionable components: API surface, auth flow, admin vs optional auth, Swagger URL, frontend/static serving logic, custom error types, and key config references.

steps.tool_input: {"path": "cmd/dashboard/main.go"}
steps.tool_output:
- CLI flags
  - -v: print singleton.Version and exit
  - -c: config file path (default data/config.yaml)
  - -db: SQLite DB path (default data/sqlite.db)

- Version info
  - singleton.Version is printed when -v is used

- Initialization sequence
  - InitFrontendTemplates
  - InitConfigFromPath(data/config.yaml by default)
  - InitTimezoneAndCache
  - If Conf.Memory.GoMemLimitMB > 0, set Go memory limit and log: "NEZHA>> Go memory limit set to X MB"
  - InitDBFromPath(data/sqlite.db by default)
  - InitTSDB
  - initSystem(bus)
    - If no users, create admin user: Username "admin", Password hash of "admin"
  - LoadSingleton(bus)
  - Cron: 
    - "0 30 3 * * *" -> singleton.CleanMonitorHistory
    - "0 0 * * * *" -> singleton.RecordTransferHourlyUsage

- Server setup
  - Listen on host:port from singleton.Conf.ListenHost and ListenPort
  - DispatchKeepalive, Start alert sentinel, start RPC and HTTP handlers
  - HTTP: muxHandler from newHTTPandGRPCMux(httpHandler, grpcHandler)
  - HTTP server settings: ReadHeaderTimeout 5s; HTTP1 enabled; unencrypted HTTP2 enabled
  - HTTPS: if Conf.HTTPS.ListenPort != 0, enable HTTPS with:
    - Addr: host:HTTPS.ListenPort
    - TLSConfig.InsecureSkipVerify = Conf.HTTPS.InsecureTLS
    - TLS cert/key: Conf.HTTPS.TLSCertPath, Conf.HTTPS.TLSKeyPath

- Graceful shutdown
  - Uses graceful.Graceful
  - On start: logs "NEZHA>> Dashboard::START ON host:port"
  - On shutdown: 
    - log Graceful START/END
    - singleton.RecordTransferHourlyUsage()
    - singleton.CloseTSDB()
    - Shutdown HTTPS (if enabled) and HTTP; combines errors via errors.Join and utils.IfOr
  - On error: log "NEZHA>> ERROR: ..." and if error is *utils.WrapError, log inner (HTTPS) error

- Networking and routing
  - newHTTPandGRPCMux handles NAT via singleton.NATShared.GetNATConfigByDomain(r.Host)
  - If NAT config exists and disabled: show block page
  - If NAT enabled: ServeNAT
  - If HTTP/2 with Content-Type application/grpc and path matches NEZHA gRPC service: route to grpcHandler
  - Otherwise route to httpHandler
  - OpenAPI/Swagger metadata present:
    - Host: localhost:8008
    - BasePath: /api/v1
    - Security: BearerAuth (Authorization header)

- Key files/paths
  - Data/config.yaml (default)
  - Data/sqlite.db (default)
  - TLSCertPath and TLSKeyPath (HTTPS)

- Embedding
  - frontendDist uses //go:embed *-dist

- Packages referenced
  - gin-gonic/gin, ory/graceful, golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt
  - embed, net/http, tls, context, flag, log, time, etc.
  - Domains: RPC, NAT, WAF, controller, waf, singleton, model, proto

- API metadata (Swagger)
  - @title Nezha Monitoring API; @version 1.0; @BasePath /api/v1; BearerAuth security; OpenAPI docs host info.

steps.tool_input: {"path": "cmd/dashboard/admin-dist"}
{"path": "cmd/dashboard/user-dist"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
WORKDIR /src

# Prepare module cache
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Create a minimal stub for docs to satisfy imports during build
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/docs
RUN bash -lc 'cat > cmd/dashboard/docs/docs_stub.go <<EOF
package docs

var SwaggerInfo = struct{ Version string }{ Version: "0.0.0" }
EOF'

# Create placeholder files for embed pattern to satisfy go:embed *-dist
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN bash -lc 'echo placeholder > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/.gitkeep'
RUN bash -lc 'echo placeholder > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/.gitkeep'

COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev

# Build for the target OS/ARCH with CGO enabled
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 \
    go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY ./script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64

COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev

# Build for the target OS/ARCH with CGO enabled
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY ./script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
WORKDIR /src

# Prepare module cache
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Create docs package stub to satisfy imports (docs package containing SwaggerInfo)
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/docs
RUN bash -lc 'cat > cmd/dashboard/docs/docs.go <<EOF
package docs

var SwaggerInfo = struct{ Version string }{ Version: "0.0.0" }
EOF'

# Create placeholders for embeds (need at least one file in each -dist dir)
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN bash -lc 'echo "<html/>"' > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN bash -lc 'echo "<html/>"' > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev

# Build for the target OS/ARCH with CGO enabled
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY ./script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input: {"path": "script/entrypoint.sh"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
WORKDIR /src

# Prepare module cache
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Create docs package stub to satisfy imports
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/docs
RUN bash -lc 'cat > cmd/dashboard/docs/docs.go <<EOF
package docs

var SwaggerInfo = struct{ Version string }{Version: "0.0.0"}
EOF'

# Ensure embeddable assets directories have a placeholder file
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN bash -lc 'echo "<html/>"' > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN bash -lc 'echo "<html/>"' > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

# Copy necessary artifacts
COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

# SQLite shared library for CGO; assume it exists in builder image
COPY --from=builder /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so.0 /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so.0

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6-alpine AS builder
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
WORKDIR /src

# Prepare module cache
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Create docs package stub to satisfy imports
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/docs
RUN printf 'package docs\n\nvar SwaggerInfo = struct{ Version string }{Version: "0.0.0"}\n' > cmd/dashboard/docs/docs.go

# Create embeddable assets directories with a placeholder file
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN printf '<html/>' > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN printf '<html/>' > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base sqlite-dev gcc musl-dev
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH

# Copy necessary artifacts
COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

RUN bash -lc 'echo "<html/>"' > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl AS runtime
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64

# Copy necessary artifacts
COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./app
COPY --from=builder /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so.0 /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so.0

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008

"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Missing file caused COPY failure**  
   - Problem: The early Dockerfile versions included `COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh` but the file didn’t exist in the repo yet.  
   - Impact: Build failed because the source path didn’t exist.  
   - Fix: Ensure `script/entrypoint.sh` exists before COPY (verified at Step 18). Use the correct relative path (`COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh`) and give it execute permissions (`RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh`).  

2. **Unset ARGs (`TARGETOS`, `TARGETARCH`)**  
   - Problem: Multiple failures (`VerifyBuild status: build_failed` or `rejected`) reported these ARGs declared without defaults in one or more stages.  
   - Impact: Paths such as `/src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}` could not resolve when no build args were passed.  
   - Fix: Define defaults in *both* build and runtime stages:  
     ```Dockerfile
     ARG TARGETOS=linux  
     ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
     ```  
     Place them *before* any COPY instructions that use those vars.  

3. **TZ data not available in final stage**  
   - Problem: tzdata was installed only in the intermediate `depend` stage, not copied into the runtime image.  
   - Impact: Runtime may fail timezone lookups.  
   - Fix: Either install tzdata again in the runtime stage (`RUN apk add --no-cache tzdata`) or copy it from the depend stage (`COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo`).  

4. **CGO / musl build compatibility risk**  
   - Problem: Go builds in `golang:1.25.6-alpine` may dynamically link against musl, producing runtime dependencies missing from the minimal final image.  
   - Fix: For static builds, disable CGO:  
     ```Dockerfile
     ENV CGO_ENABLED=0  
     RUN go build -o /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard
     ```  
     or alternatively build on `golang:1.25.6` (Debian) rather than alpine.  

5. **Build context too large / .dockerignore corrections**  
   - Problem: Early `.dockerignore` hid everything (`*`) after ignoring some directories, potentially excluding needed build paths.  
   - Fix: Remove the trailing wildcard `*` that blocks all context. Explicitly ignore only large/vendor dirs, not source files.  

6. **Final COPY path mismatch**  
   - Problem: COPY in runtime stage referenced `/src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}`, but builder output path or filename didn’t confirm this structure.  
   - Fix: Make the build output and final copy paths match exactly:  
     ```Dockerfile
     RUN go build -o /app/dashboard ./cmd/dashboard  
     COPY --from=builder /app/dashboard /dashboard/app
     ```  

7. **Entrypoint clarity**  
   - Problem: Some builds relied on implicit ENTRYPOINT or CMD.  
   - Fix: Explicitly set:  
     ```Dockerfile
     ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
     ```  
     Ensure app binary path `/dashboard/app` matches entrypoint execution.

This can cause runtime errors due to missing libraries.", "Using a CGO-enabled build with a non-glibc final image can cause execution issues; either switch CGO off (CGO_ENABLED=0) to produce a static Go binary, or use a final image based on a glibc-compatible/runtime that includes necessary libraries.", "Potential risk with entrypoint: the final image copies an entrypoint script but its behavior is unknown; if it relies on environment or filesystem layout, ensure /entrypoint.sh and /dashboard/app behave as expected in BusyBox-based containers."]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6 AS builder
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-cache --no-install-recommends build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM alpine AS depend
RUN apk add --update --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata

FROM golang:1.25.6 AS builder
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Prepare embeddable assets to satisfy go:embed patterns
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist cmd/dashboard/docs
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html
RUN printf "package docs\n" > cmd/dashboard/docs/doc.go

ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
COPY . .
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM busybox:stable-musl
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

COPY --from=depend /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs
COPY --from=depend /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008
ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM golang:1.25.6 AS builder

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install swag for Swagger docs
RUN GO111MODULE=on go install github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@latest

WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Generate swagger docs
COPY . .
RUN swag init --pd -d . -g ./cmd/dashboard/main.go -o ./cmd/dashboard/docs --requiredByDefault

# Build for target OS/ARCH
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates tzdata sqlite3 libsqlite3-0 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy built binary and assets
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

WORKDIR /dashboard

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008

# Copy timezone and certs from builder (already present in base image, but ensure they're available)
COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM golang:1.25.6 as builder

# Install dependencies for build
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install swag for Swagger docs generation
RUN go install github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@latest

WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Prepare embeddable assets to satisfy embed patterns
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .

# Generate swagger docs
RUN swag init --pd -d . -g ./cmd/dashboard/main.go -o ./cmd/dashboard/docs --requiredByDefault

# Build for target OS/ARCH
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM debian:bookworm-slim as runtime

# Runtime args
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates tzdata sqlite3 libsqlite3-0 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /dashboard

# Copy built binary and assets
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY --from=builder /src/cmd/dashboard/docs /dashboard/docs
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

# Copy timezone and certs from runtime image
COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
"}

FROM golang:1.25.6 as builder

# Install dependencies for build
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev ca-certificates tzdata curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install swag for Swagger docs generation
RUN go install github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@latest

WORKDIR /src
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Prepare embeddable assets to satisfy embed patterns
RUN mkdir -p cmd/dashboard/admin-dist cmd/dashboard/user-dist
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/admin-dist/index.html
RUN echo "<html></html>" > cmd/dashboard/user-dist/index.html

COPY . .

# Generate swagger docs
RUN swag init --pd -d . -g ./cmd/dashboard/main.go -o ./cmd/dashboard/docs --requiredByDefault

# Build for target OS/ARCH
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
RUN mkdir -p dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}
ENV CGO_ENABLED=1
RUN GOOS=${TARGETOS} GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} ./cmd/dashboard

FROM debian:bookworm-slim as runtime

# Runtime args
ARG TARGETOS=linux
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
ARG TZ=Asia/Shanghai
ENV TZ=$TZ

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates tzdata sqlite3 libsqlite3-0 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /dashboard

# Copy built binary and assets
COPY --from=builder /src/dist/dashboard-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH} /dashboard/app
COPY --from=builder /src/cmd/dashboard/docs /dashboard/docs
COPY script/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

# Copy timezone and certs from runtime image
COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs

VOLUME ["/dashboard/data"]
EXPOSE 8008

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
